review_scope.decision: The pinned Custos execution ABI, artifact schemas, asset index, and lifecycle golden are compatible with the Plan 54 producer requirements.
does_not_accept: Custos toolkit wheel or toolkit SBOM readiness
Philosophers-Stone strategy wheel or manifest completion
artifact attestation or runtime verification completion

canonicalization_contract.numbers: finite Decimal or integer; float and non-finite values forbidden

contract_assets.requirements_role: exact strategy wheel, manifest, runtime artifact, attestation, SBOM, and contract-schema evidence
local fail-closed verification evidence that losslessly echoes the command member table
deployment instance, spec provenance, generation, StrategyRelease, BOM member table, ArtifactRef, and effective-config binding
runtime identity and provenance passed to the strategy adapter
artifact-local ABI, entry point, engine, Python, toolkit, config-schema, and runtime-artifact metadata

golden_contract_assertions: the signed command preserves deployment instance identity, spec provenance, generation, StrategyRelease identity, BOM digest and member table, ArtifactRef, and effective-config digest
the Custos verifier receipt echoes the complete signed command artifact binding and verified member table
ArtifactRef contains no release, deployment, approval, or selection authority

the release member projection contains exactly one base-contracts wheel, Nautilus wheel, strategy wheel, strategy manifest, attestation bundle, SBOM, contract schema, and source tree, while runtime artifacts may repeat

plan_54_compatibility.boundary: Philosophers-Stone produces canonical BOM bytes and a detached attestation receipt; Crucible composes the command-bound release member projection; Custos verifies and executes it.

remaining_gates: Custos must publish its own clean Task 2 handoff receipt with producer commit, clean-worktree fact, asset-index digest, and fresh authority verification evidence.
Custos must publish an immutable toolkit RC coordinate, base-contracts wheel digest, Nautilus wheel digest, and toolkit SBOM digest before Plan 54 Slice B.
Philosophers-Stone must define a wheel-local runtime adapter entry point under alephain.strategy_runtime.v1.
Philosophers-Stone must converge its strategy package to Python >=3.12,<3.13 and Nautilus 1.230.0.
Philosophers-Stone must remove the v1.team artifact dependency on the legacy top-level shared namespace and prove the scoped mypy gate.
Philosophers-Stone must build and verify deterministic strategy wheel, manifest, BOM, attestation, and runtime evidence before any production handoff.
non_claims: This receipt does not change docs/authority/receipts/ps-plan-54-slice-a-contract-lock.json from PENDING or make it handoff-ready.
This receipt does not prove that the Philosophers-Stone Plan 54 BOM exists or is complete.
This receipt does not prove image, toolkit wheel, strategy wheel, manifest, SBOM, attestation, verifier, or runtime completion.
This receipt is not a StrategyRelease approval and does not mark any artifact Released.
This receipt does not replace fresh Custos or Philosophers-Stone verification evidence.
The legacy Philosophers-Stone Python image build and deployment lane remains independent, unchanged, and non-gating for this review.

vendor_verification.asset_rule: For every contract_assets entry, hash the exact git-show blob at the pinned commit and require both sha256 and size_bytes to match.
